# Alexandre Larue

> Alexandre Larue is a French Full Stack Developer specialized in backend development, cloud computing, DevOps practices and scalable software architecture.

## About

Alexandre Larue is a developer focused on building robust and maintainable technical solutions.

His main interests include:
- Backend engineering
- Cloud infrastructure
- DevOps automation
- System design
- Performance optimization
- Open-source software

He develops projects using modern technologies such as Python, TypeScript, Rust, Docker and Linux.

Portfolio owner:
https://alexandre-larue.fr

## Projects

### NohamDrive

A personal cloud storage platform designed as an alternative to traditional cloud solutions.

Main technologies:
- Nuxt
- Vue.js
- FastAPI
- PostgreSQL
- MinIO
- Docker
- Redis

Technical focus:
- File storage architecture
- Backend API design
- Real-time synchronization
- Cloud infrastructure

Project page:
https://alexandre-larue.fr/projects/nohamdrive


### Desktop Converter

A desktop application for converting files between multiple formats with a focus on performance and local processing.

Main technologies:
- Rust
- Tauri
- Vue.js

Technical focus:
- Native desktop applications
- File processing
- Performance optimization
- Local-first software

Project page:
https://alexandre-larue.fr/projects/converter


### Vesselify

A monitoring and infrastructure management project.

Main technologies:
- Nuxt
- AdonisJS
- PostgreSQL
- Docker

Technical focus:
- Monitoring systems
- Backend architecture
- Containerized applications

Project page:
https://alexandre-larue.fr/projects/vesselify

Programming languages:
- Python
